digest.component_or_area: LLM review gate observability sidecars and audit read layer
propositions: Plan-review and code-review sidecars discard data (pass-1 evidence/scenarios, non-surfaced finding buckets, resolved numeric block_threshold), so the stored review record is incomplete.

New plan_review_result_v2 and code_review_result_v2 sidecars capture the full four-pass record across all buckets including per-finding verification, pass-3 determination, resolved block_threshold, and pass-4 coaching.
Completion-verification previously emitted a sidecar only on FAIL, leaving a PASS with no per-criterion audit record; a PASS now persists a per-criterion completion audit record.
Review-sidecar retention cap is raised so a ticket's review history is deep enough to audit.
A documented read API (library, CLI 'rebar audit show', MCP audit_trail) returns full retained audit history for a ticket and resolves associated code reviews via relates_to links.
Sidecar schemas are bumped to v2 while readers accept both v1 and v2 so pre-existing reviews stay readable with no backfill required.
